proposals.title: Document Hermes-assisted supervisor sprint
proposals.body: Update docs/dev/HERMES_ASSISTED_SELF_BOOTSTRAP_SPRINT.md and docs/dev/PROGRESS.md with a bounded Hermes-assisted preview record.
proposals.prompt_summary: Document the Hermes-assisted self-bootstrap sprint preview.
acceptance_criteria: The sprint report records Hermes planner metadata without secrets.
The progress log summarizes the bounded preview result.
proposals.rationale: Start with a docs-only record before any additional automation changes.
proposals.stop_condition: Stop if execution would edit outside the expected docs files.

proposals.title: Clarify multiround supervisor runbook
proposals.body: Update docs/orchestrator/SELF_BOOTSTRAP_SUPERVISOR.md with the bounded Hermes advisory workflow.
proposals.prompt_summary: Clarify Hermes advisory multiround supervisor behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Runbook states Hermes cannot execute shell or bypass policy.
Runbook states MaxRounds is bounded and PollOnce-only.
evidence_requirements: No production deployment steps are added.
proposals.rationale: Operator-facing multiround behavior needs deterministic safety notes.
proposals.stop_condition: Stop if the change requires secrets, deployment, GitHub settings or branch protection.
